linting.notes: Ruff is configured in pyproject.toml with line-length=100, target-version=py310. Selects: E, W, F, I, B, C4, UP. pip-audit runs in CI to check for dependency vulnerabilities.

testing.mock_patterns: Uses pytest-mock and unittest.mock.patch. Mock OAuth server in tests/mock_oauth_server.py for integration tests.
testing.notes: Tests are organized by marker: 'unit' (fast, no external deps), 'integration' (uses mock OAuth server), 'e2e' (requires real services), 'slow'. CI runs unit and integration tests separately, then combines coverage. Unit tests: pytest tests/ -m 'not integration'. Integration tests: pytest tests/ -m integration.

gating_checks.name: Unit tests (matrix: Python 3.10, 3.11, 3.12 on ubuntu-latest, macos-latest)
Integration tests (matrix: Python 3.10, 3.11, 3.12 on ubuntu-latest, macos-latest)

ci.notes: CI triggers on push to main/feat/*/fix/* and pull_request to main. Test job uses fail-fast: false strategy matrix across Python versions and OS. Codecov uploads from ubuntu-latest + Python 3.12 runs only.

build.notes: Uses UV package manager (modern Python dependency tool) for faster installs. Build backend is hatchling. Dev dependencies include pytest, pytest-cov, pytest-mock, ruff. Main dependencies: kubernetes>=35.0.0, requests>=2.31.0, PyJWT>=2.8.0, urllib3>=2.6.0.

conventions.test_naming: Test functions: test_*, Test classes: Test*, organized in tests/ with subdirs strategies/ and integration/
conventions.import_style: Standard Python imports, grouped by stdlib, third-party, first-party
conventions.notes: Uses dataclasses for config (src/kube_authkit/config.py). Strategy pattern for different auth methods (kubeconfig, incluster, oidc, openshift). Type hints are used throughout.

setup_commands: apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl git make && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

test_commands.notes: Exit 1: 181 passed, 4 failed (permission tests fail running as root), 79% coverage
Exit 1: 46 passed, 0 failed, 59% coverage (below 70% threshold when run alone)
Exit 1: 227 passed, 4 failed (permission tests), 80% coverage (exceeds 70% threshold)

container_recipe.notes: 4 test failures are permission-related tests that fail when running as root (test_is_not_available_unreadable_token, test_is_not_available_unreadable_ca_cert, test_get_namespace_read_error, test_is_not_available_unreadable_file). These tests check behavior when files are unreadable (chmod 0o000), but root can read them anyway. In normal CI environments running as non-root user, these tests pass. The actual test framework and commands work correctly.
